inputs.label: Functional Capacity (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Patient's ability to perform normal daily activities independently.

businessContext_i18n.en: Patient's ability to perform normal daily activities independently.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hastanın normal günlük aktivitelerini bağımsız olarak gerçekleştirme yeteneği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fähigkeit des Patienten, normale tägliche Aktivitäten selbstständig auszuführen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité du patient à effectuer les activités quotidiennes normales de manière indépendante.
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad del paciente para realizar actividades diarias normales de forma independiente.

inputs.label: Self-Care (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Ability to handle personal care without assistance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ability to handle personal care without assistance.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fähigkeit, die persönliche Pflege ohne Hilfe zu bewältigen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité à gérer les soins personnels sans assistance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad para manejar el cuidado personal sin asistencia.

inputs.label: Disease Symptoms (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Severity of disease-related symptoms, higher means fewer symptoms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Severity of disease-related symptoms, higher means fewer symptoms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hastalıkla ilgili semptomların şiddeti; yüksek değer daha az semptom anlamına gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schweregrad der krankheitsbedingten Symptome, höher bedeutet weniger Symptome.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Gravité des symptômes liés à la maladie, plus élevé signifie moins de symptômes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gravedad de los síntomas relacionados con la enfermedad, mayor significa menos síntomas.

inputs.label: Nutritional Status (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Adequacy of nutritional intake and weight maintenance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adequacy of nutritional intake and weight maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besin alımının yeterliliği ve kilo korunumu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Adéquation de l'apport nutritionnel et maintien du poids.
businessContext_i18n.es: Adecuación de la ingesta nutricional y mantenimiento del peso.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Bilişsel berraklık ve duygusal iyilik hali.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
